attempt: Transfer TICKET50's rule: when a local obstruction fails at a higher horizon, do not hide the failure. Promote the exception as the next stress witness and state the exact terminal obstruction.

bounded_result.candidate_theorem: If an off-critical zero-kernel obstruction fails at a higher height, promote the zero-kernel witness and classify the first terminal coordinate.
